sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109775" key="u(/fadros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕφαδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109775.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat thick, stout,</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strong,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱμάτιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.57</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
